detail.description:
Block World 3D is a sandbox game with crafting and building, where you can explore, craft, survive, build and more with other players.

CRAFTING
This is a block craft game and you are the best craftsman. You may create many items and blocks from crafting recipes. Build a city and have a school party craft there.

BUILDING
This is a building game in sandbox mode. Build your house or build your world. In creative mode, you can build any buildings and structures. The game has a built-in editor for
